title: sphaerolobium fornicatum
intro: Sphaerolobium fornicatum, also known as the spiny globeflower, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It is a shrub that produces yellow flowers, and its stems and leaves are covered with sharp, spiny hairs, making it a unique and distinctive species. The medicinal properties of Sphaerolobium fornicatum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for topical use.
